[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101000 2
1 000000100 1
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

01 001000000 1

23 100000100 2
34 000000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6 7

67 000000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6 7
